title: Destroying A World That Doesn’t Exist
original_title: Destroying A World That Doesn’t Exist
overview: A strange book appears in Avery's world warning him to run away, but instead he decides to investigate and hunt down the author - the missing player d3rlord3. But what he discovers inside his world is more than he could have ever imagined..
